# Patriots in Action

A nationwide county-by-county civic network for local events, trusted resources, community updates, and practical action.

Patriots in Action is a nationwide and local civic hub with county pages for voter resources, elected official lookups, candidate profiles, local news, events, community updates, Patriots in Action TV, and practical civic action.

Important URLs:
- Home: https://patriotsinaction.com/
- County finder: https://patriotsinaction.com/counties
- Texas candidates: https://patriotsinaction.com/tx/candidates
- PIA TV: https://patriotsinaction.com/tv
- Contact: https://patriotsinaction.com/contact
- Privacy: https://patriotsinaction.com/privacy
- Terms: https://patriotsinaction.com/terms

County URLs use state abbreviations, for example https://patriotsinaction.com/tx/potter.
